seo.title: SaaS Services and Platform Support
seo.description: Explore Beta SaaS services for workflow design, implementation, analytics setup, and ongoing product enablement.

sections.title: Product and implementation support for modern teams
sections.description: Beta SaaS combines cloud software with guided services so your team can configure, launch, and improve operating workflows.
sections.imageAlt: Beta SaaS implementation specialists pairing on a workflow design session

items.title: Workflow mapping
items.description: Translate messy internal processes into clear software flows with owners and outcomes.

items.title: Analytics configuration
items.description: Set up dashboards for activation, retention, support load, and revenue operations signals.

items.title: Team enablement
items.description: Help admins and operators understand how to maintain workflows after launch.

sections.title: What you get with the platform
sections.description: Operating-grade primitives so customer teams stop rebuilding the same coordination glue.

items.title: Workflow automation
items.description: Trigger handoffs, approvals, and notifications without writing custom integration code.

items.title: Operating analytics
items.description: Pre-built dashboards for activation, retention, support, and renewal motion.

items.title: Role-based access
items.description: Granular permissions so each team only sees the workflows and data they need.

items.title: Open API
items.description: Sync data both ways with your CRM, support, billing, and product analytics tools.

items.title: SOC 2 Type II
items.description: Annual audit covering security, availability, and confidentiality controls.

items.title: GDPR aligned
items.description: Data subject rights workflows and EU data handling procedures documented and reviewed.

items.title: Encrypted in transit and at rest
items.description: TLS in transit and AES-256 at rest across application data stores.
